    208. 
            
              22
            

            

              def download_image(attachment, target_dir, base_name)
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                return unless attachment.attached?
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

            
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

                # Get file extension from content type or filename
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                extension = if attachment.content_type
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

                              case attachment.content_type
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                              when "image/jpeg", "image/jpg"
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                                ".jpg"
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

                              when "image/png"
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                                ".png"
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                              when "image/webp"
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                                ".webp"
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                              when "image/gif"
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            

                                ".gif"
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

                              else
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

                                File.extname(attachment.filename.to_s) || ".jpg"
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

                              end
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            

                else
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            

                              File.extname(attachment.filename.to_s) || ".jpg"
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

                end
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

            
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            

                filename = "#{base_name}#{extension}"
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            

                file_path = File.join(target_dir, filename)
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

            
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232.

    32. 
            

            

                    7. Material: Identify the material/fabric if visible
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33.

      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            

                    9. Occasion: Appropriate occasions (work, casual, formal, athletic, etc.)

    35. 
            

            

                    10. Fit notes: Note about fit or sizing
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36.

      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37.

    38. 
            

            

                    13. Category suggestion: If category is wrong, suggest correct category
          
      39. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    39.

      29. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    29. 
            
              22
            

            

                  if results["parse_error"] || (results["confidence"] || 0) < 0.1
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30. 
            
              22
            

            

                    Rails.logger.warn "Analysis completed with low confidence or parse error: #{results.inspect}"
          
      31. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    31. 
            

            

                    # Don't fail, return partial results for graceful degradation
          
      32. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    32. 
            

            

                  end
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            

            
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34.

      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35.

                  enhance_with_matching(results)
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36.

                rescue ArgumentError => e

                  {

              22
            

            

                    "error" => "Invalid request: #{e.message}",

                # Check Ollama availability and model presence using HTTP requests (similar to curl)
          
      56.

              22
            

            

                def check_ollama_availability!
          
      57. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    57.

                  ollama_base = ENV["OLLAMA_API_BASE"] || "http://localhost:11434"
          
      58. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    58. 
            
              264
            

            

                  base_uri = URI(ollama_base)
          
      59. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    59. 
            

            

            
          
      60. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    60. 
            
              264

    61. 
            

            

            
          
      62. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    62. 
            

            

                  # Check if Ollama service is reachable (like: curl http://localhost:11434/api/tags)
          
      63. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    63. 
            

            

                  begin
          
      64. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    64. 
            
              264
            

            

                    http = Net::HTTP.new(base_uri.host, base_uri.port)
          
      65. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    65. 
            
              264
            

            

                    http.open_timeout = 3
          
      66. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    66. 
            
              264
            

            

                    http.read_timeout = 3
          
      67. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    67. 
            

            

            
          
      68. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    68. 
            

            

                    # Check if Ollama is up
          
      69. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    69. 
            
              264
            

            

                    tags_response = http.get("/api/tags")
          
      70. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    70. 
            
              154
            

            

                    unless tags_response.code == "200"
          
      71. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    71. 
            
              22
            

            

                      raise StandardError, "Ollama API returned status #{tags_response.code}"
          
      72. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    72. 
            

            

                    end
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

            
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                    # Parse response and check if model exists
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            
              132
            

            

                    models_data = JSON.parse(tags_response.body)
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            
              110
            

            

                    available_models = models_data["models"] || []
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77. 
            

            

            
          
      78. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    78. 
            

            

                    # Check if our model is in the list
          
      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            
              110
            

            

                    model_exists = available_models.any? do |m|
          
      80. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    80. 
            
              110
            

            

                      (m["name"] && (m["name"] == model_name || m["name"].start_with?("#{model_name}:"))) ||
          
      81. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    81. 
            
              44
            

            

                      (m["model"] && (m["model"] == model_name || m["model"].start_with?("#{model_name}:")))
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82. 
            

            

                    end
          
      83. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    83. 
            

            

            
          
      84. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    84. 
            
              110
            

            

                    unless model_exists
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            
              44
            

            

                      model_names = available_models.map { |m| m["name"] || m["model"] }.compact.join(", ")
          
      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            
              22
            

            

                      Rails.logger.warn "Model #{model_name} not found in Ollama. Available models: #{model_names}"
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            
              22
            

            

                      raise StandardError, "Model #{model_name} is not available in Ollama. Available models: #{model_names}. Please pull it first: ollama pull #{model_name}"
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88. 
            

            

                    end
          
      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

            
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90. 
            
              88
            

            

                    Rails.logger.info "✓ Ollama is available and model #{model_name} is present"
          
      91. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    91. 
            

            

                  rescue Errno::ECONNREFUSED, Errno::EHOSTUNREACH, SocketError => e
          
      92. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    92. 
            
              66
            

            

                    Rails.logger.error "Cannot connect to Ollama at #{ollama_base}: #{e.message}"
          
      93. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    93. 
            
              66
            

            

                    raise StandardError, "Ollama service is not available at #{ollama_base}. Please ensure Ollama is running. You can test with: curl #{ollama_base}/api/tags"
          
      94. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    94. 
            

            

                  rescue Net::ReadTimeout, Net::OpenTimeout, Timeout::Error => e
          
      95. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    95. 
            
              44
            

            

                    Rails.logger.error "Timeout connecting to Ollama: #{e.message}"
          
      96. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    96. 
            
              44
            

            

                    raise StandardError, "Timeout connecting to Ollama service. Please check if Ollama is running."
          
      97. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    97. 
            

            

                  rescue JSON::ParserError => e
          
      98. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    98. 
            
              22

      99. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    99. 
            
              22
            

            

                    raise StandardError, "Ollama returned invalid response. Please check Ollama installation."
          
      100. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    100. 
            

            

                  rescue StandardError => e
          
      101. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    101. 
            

            

                    # Re-raise if it's our custom error, otherwise wrap it
          
      102. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    102. 
            
              44
            

            

                    raise e if e.message.include?("Ollama") || e.message.include?("Model")
          
      103. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    103. 
            

            

                    Rails.logger.error "Error checking Ollama availability: #{e.message}"

      105.

                def perform_analysis
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109. 
            
              198

    110.

                  image_data = prepare_image_data
          
      111. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    111. 
            

            

            
          
      112. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    112. 
            
              198
            

            

                  unless image_data.present?
          
      113.

              22
            

            

                    raise ArgumentError, "Could not prepare image data"
          
      114. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    114.

      115. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    115. 
            

            

            
          
      116. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    116. 
            

            

                  # Create a temporary chat for analysis
          
      117. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    117. 
            
              176
            

            

                  chat = create_chat
          
      118. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    118. 
            

            

            
          
      119. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    119. 
            

            

                  # For Ollama vision models, we need to pass the image to chat.ask
          
      120. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    120. 
            

            

                  # RubyLLM supports passing images using the 'with:' parameter which accepts a file path
          
      121. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    121. 
            

            

                  # We need to get a file path from the ActiveStorage blob
          
      122. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    122. 
            

            

                  begin
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            
              176
            

            

                    image_path = nil
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            
              176
            

            

                    temp_file = nil
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            

            

            
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            

            

                    # Try to get the file path from ActiveStorage (works for DiskService)
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127. 
            
              176
            

            

                    if image_blob.service.respond_to?(:path_for)
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128. 
            
              44
            

            

                      image_path = image_blob.service.path_for(image_blob.key)
          
      129. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    129. 
            

            

                    end
          
      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130. 
            

            

            
          
      131. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    131. 
            

            

                    # If we don't have a direct path, create a temp file
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            
              176
            

            

                    unless image_path && File.exist?(image_path)
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            
              154
            

            

                      require "tempfile"
          
      134. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    134. 
            
              154
            

            

                      extension = image_blob.filename.extension_with_delimiter || ".jpg"
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135. 
            
              154
            

            

                      temp_file = Tempfile.new([ "ollama_image", extension ])
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136. 
            
              154
            

            

                      temp_file.binmode
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            
              154
            

            

                      temp_file.write(image_blob.download)
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            
              154
            

            

                      temp_file.flush
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            
              154
            

            

                      image_path = temp_file.path
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            

            

                    end
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            

            
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            

                    # Use RubyLLM's 'with:' parameter to pass the image file path
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            
              176
            

            

                    assistant_message = chat.ask(prompt, with: image_path)
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            

            
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            

                    # Clean up temp file if we created one
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            
              132
            

            

                    if temp_file
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            
              110
            

            

                      temp_file.close
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            
              110
            

            

                      temp_file.unlink
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            

                    end
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

            
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            
              132
            

            

                    unless assistant_message&.content.present?
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            
              22
            

            

                      raise StandardError, "Empty response from AI model"
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            

                    end
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

            
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

                    # Parse the response into structured data
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            
              110
            

            

                    parse_analysis_response(assistant_message.content)
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            

                  rescue ArgumentError => e
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                    # Log and re-raise argument errors
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159.

                    Rails.logger.error "Invalid arguments for chat.ask: #{e.message}"
          
      160.

                    raise e
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                  rescue StandardError => e
          
      162.

      163.

              44
            

            

                    if e.message.include?("connection") || e.message.include?("refused")
          
      164.

      167.

    170. 
            
              22
            

            

                def create_chat
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

                  # Create a temporary chat for this analysis session
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

                  # We need a model record for the chat
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            
              220
            

            

                  model = Model.find_or_create_by!(
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

                    provider: "ollama",
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

                    model_id: model_name
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

                  ) do |m|
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            
              198
            

            

                    m.name = model_name
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            
              198
            

            

                    m.context_window = 8192
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            
              198
            

            

                    m.family = "gemma"
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                  end
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

            
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            
              220
            

            

                  Chat.create!(
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

                    user: user,
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                    model: model
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

                  ).tap do |chat|
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            
              220
            

            

                    Rails.logger.info "Created chat #{chat.id} for image analysis"
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                  end
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                end
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

            
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            
              22
            

            

                def prepare_image_data
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                  # Convert ActiveStorage blob to base64 data URI for vision API
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            
              198
            

            

                  return nil unless image_blob.present?
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

            
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                  # Download blob data
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            
              198
            

            

                  image_data = image_blob.download
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

            
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

                  # Convert to base64
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            
              198
            

            

                  base64_data = Base64.strict_encode64(image_data)
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

            
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                  # Get content type
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            
              198
            

            

                  content_type = image_blob.content_type || "image/jpeg"
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

            
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

                  # Return data URI format
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            
              198
            

            

                  "data:#{content_type};base64,#{base64_data}"
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                end
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

            
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            
              22
            

            

                def analysis_prompt
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

                  # Get available categories to help the AI choose correctly
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            
              220
            

            

                  available_categories = Category.active.order(:name).pluck(:name).join(", ")
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

            
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            
              220
            

            

                  <<~PROMPT
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                    You are a fashion analysis AI. Analyze this image of a clothing/fashion item and extract all relevant information for creating an inventory item.
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

            
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                    IMPORTANT: You MUST choose a category_name from the following list of available categories in the database:
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                    #{available_categories}
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

            
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                    If the item doesn't match any category exactly, choose the CLOSEST match. For example:
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                    - "Satchel", "Handbag", "Tote", "Backpack", "Purse" → use "Bags" (if available) or the closest match
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219.

    225.

      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            

                      "name": "Descriptive name for this item (e.g., 'Blue Cotton T-Shirt', 'Nike Running Sneakers')",
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

                      "description": "Rich, detailed description for vector search. Include: colors, materials, size if visible, style characteristics, fit details, seasonality, occasions suitable for, and any notable features. Be comprehensive and descriptive - this will be used for semantic search. Example: 'A vibrant mint green structured leather satchel with a clean, minimalist aesthetic. Features include a top handle, detachable shoulder strap, secure closure, and visible stitching. The structured design maintains its shape and provides a polished, professional look. Suitable for everyday use, work, and casual occasions. Made from high-quality leather with silver hardware accents. This versatile bag transitions well across seasons.'",
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

                      "brand_name": "Brand name if visible, or null if not visible",
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229.

      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231.

      234.

      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235.

      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            

                    - description should be RICH and COMPREHENSIVE - include colors, materials, style, fit, season, occasion, and features. This is used for vector search.
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            

                    - If information is not visible or unclear, use null for that field (except description - always provide a description)
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            

                    - confidence should reflect how certain you are about the overall analysis
          
      239.

      101.

              44
            

            

                  prompt = analysis_prompt

      111.

              44
            

            

                  chat = create_chat
          
      112.

                  begin
          
      114. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    114. 
            
              44
            

            

                    image_path = nil
          
      115. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    115. 
            
              44
            

            

                    temp_file = nil
          
      116. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    116. 
            

            

            
          
      117. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    117. 
            

            

                    # Try to get the file path from ActiveStorage (works for DiskService)
          
      118. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    118. 
            
              44
            

            

                    if image_blob.service.respond_to?(:path_for)
          
      119. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    119. 
            

            

                      image_path = image_blob.service.path_for(image_blob.key)
          
      120. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    120. 
            

            

                    end
          
      121. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    121. 
            

            

            
          
      122. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    122. 
            

            

                    # If we don't have a direct path, create a temp file
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            
              44
            

            

                    unless image_path && File.exist?(image_path)
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            
              44
            

            

                      require "tempfile"
          
      125.

    126. 
            
              44
            

            

                      temp_file = Tempfile.new([ "ollama_outfit", extension ])

    127. 
            
              44
            

            

                      temp_file.binmode
          
      128.

                      temp_file.write(image_blob.download)

              44
            

            

                      temp_file.flush
          
      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130.

                      image_path = temp_file.path
          
      131. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    131. 
            

            

                    end
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            

            

            
          
      133.

      134.

              44
            

            

                    assistant_message = chat.ask(prompt, with: image_path)
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135. 
            

            

            
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136.

                    if temp_file

                      temp_file.close
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            
              44
            

            

                      temp_file.unlink
          
      140.

    141. 
            

            

            
          
      142.

              44
            

            

                    unless assistant_message&.content.present?

                    parse_analysis_response(assistant_message.content)
          
      148.

                  rescue ArgumentError => e

                    if e.message.include?("connection") || e.message.include?("refused")

              22
            

            

                def create_chat
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                  # Create a temporary chat for this analysis session
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            
              44
            

            

                  model = Model.find_or_create_by!(
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

                    provider: "ollama",
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

                    model_id: model_name
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

                  ) do |m|
          
      166.

              44
            

            

                    m.name = model_name

              44

      168.

              44

      169.

              22
            

            

                def analysis_prompt
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                  # Get available categories to help the AI choose correctly
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            
              66
            

            

                  available_categories = Category.active.order(:name).pluck(:name).join(", ")
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

            
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            
              66
            

            

                  <<~PROMPT
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                    You are a fashion analysis AI. Analyze this image of a complete outfit and detect ALL individual clothing items, shoes, accessories, and jewelry visible in the photo.
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

            
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                    IMPORTANT: You MUST choose category_name for each item from the following list of available categories in the database:
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                    #{available_categories}
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

            
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                    If an item doesn't match any category exactly, choose the CLOSEST match from the list above.
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

            
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                    Detect and extract information for EACH separate item in the outfit. Return an array of items with the following structure:
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

            
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                    {
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                      "total_items": <number of items detected>,
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                      "items": [
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                        {
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

                          "category_name": "Category name FROM THE LIST ABOVE - must match exactly or be very close",
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                          "name": "Descriptive name for this item (e.g., 'Blue Cotton T-Shirt', 'Nike Running Sneakers')",
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

                          "description": "Rich, detailed description for vector search. Include: colors, materials, size if visible, style characteristics, fit details, seasonality, occasions suitable for, and any notable features. Be comprehensive and descriptive.",
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                          "brand_name": "Brand name if visible, or null if not visible",
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

                          "style_notes": "Any additional style notes or observations about the item's aesthetic or design",
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

                          "position": "Description of where this item appears in the outfit (e.g., 'top layer', 'bottom', 'footwear', 'accessory')",
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

                          "confidence": 0.0 to 1.0
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            

                        },
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                        ... (repeat for each detected item)
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

                      ]
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

                    }
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

            
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

                    Important:
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

                    - Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown formatting or additional text
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

                    - Detect ALL visible items: clothing (tops, bottoms, outerwear), shoes, bags, accessories, jewelry, etc.
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                    - category_name MUST be from the available categories list above for each item
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

                    - description should be RICH and COMPREHENSIVE for each item - include colors, materials, style, fit, season, occasion, and features
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                    - If information is not visible or unclear for an item, use null for that field (except description - always provide a description)
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                    - confidence should reflect how certain you are about each item's analysis
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

                    - Include at least 2-3 items minimum (outfit typically has multiple pieces)
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                    - Be thorough but accurate - don't invent items that aren't clearly visible
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                  PROMPT
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                end
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

            
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            
              22
            

            

                def parse_analysis_response(content)
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

                  # Try to extract JSON from the response
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            
              132
            

            

                  json_match = content.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/m)
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

            
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            
              132
            

            

                  if json_match
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            
              110
            

            

                    parsed = JSON.parse(json_match[0])
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

            
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

                    # Ensure items array exists
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            
              110
            

            

                    parsed["items"] ||= []
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            
              110
            

            

                    parsed["total_items"] = parsed["items"].length
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

            
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

                    # Ensure each item has required fields
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            
              110
            

            

                    parsed["items"] = parsed["items"].map do |item|
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            
              132
            

            

                      item["confidence"] ||= 0.5
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            
              132
            

            

                      item["description"] ||= "No description available"
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            
              132
            

            

                      item["position"] ||= "unknown"
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            
              132
            

            

                      item
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            

                    end
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            

            
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            
              110
            

            

                    parsed
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            

                  else
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            
              22
            

            

                    Rails.logger.warn "Could not parse JSON from AI response: #{content.truncate(200)}"
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            

                    {
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            
              22
            

            

                      "items" => [],
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            

                      "total_items" => 0,
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            

            

                      "parse_error" => true,
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            

            

                      "error" => "Could not parse response"
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            

            

                    }
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            

                  end
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            

                rescue JSON::ParserError => e
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            

                  Rails.logger.error "JSON parse error: #{e.message}"
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            

                  {
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            

                    "items" => [],
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            

            

                    "total_items" => 0,
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            

                    "parse_error" => true,
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            

                    "error" => e.message
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            

                  }
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            

                end
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            

            
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            
              22
            

            

                def enhance_item_with_matching(item_data)
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            

            

                  # Match category from database
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            
              88
            

            

                  if item_data["category_name"].present?
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            
              66
            

            

                    matched_category = find_matching_category(item_data["category_name"])
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            
              66
            

            

                    item_data["category_id"] = matched_category&.id
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            
              66
            

            

                    item_data["category_matched"] = matched_category&.name
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            

            

                  end
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            

            

            
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            

            

                  # Match brand from database
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            
              88
            

            

                  if item_data["brand_name"].present?
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            
              44
            

            

                    matched_brand = find_matching_brand(item_data["brand_name"])
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            
              44
            

            

                    item_data["brand_id"] = matched_brand&.id
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            
              44
            

            

                    item_data["brand_matched"] = matched_brand&.name
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            
              44
            

            

                    item_data["brand_suggested"] = item_data["brand_name"] unless matched_brand
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            

            

                  end
          
      275. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    275. 
            

            

            
          
      276. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    276. 
            
              88
            

            

                  item_data
          
      277. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    277. 
            

            

                end
          
      278. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    278. 
            

            

            
          
      279. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    279. 
            

            

                # Reuse category matching logic from InventoryCreationAnalyzer
          
      280. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    280. 
            
              22
            

            

                def find_matching_category(category_name)
          
      281. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    281. 
            
              88
            

            

                  return nil if category_name.blank?
          
      282. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    282. 
            

            

            
          
      283. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    283. 
            
              88
            

            

                  normalized_name = category_name.downcase.strip
          
      284. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    284. 
            

            

            
          
      285. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    285. 
            

            

                  # Exact match
          
      286. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    286. 
            
              88
            

            

                  category = Category.active.where("LOWER(name) = ?", normalized_name).first
          
      287. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    287. 
            
              88
            

            

                  return category if category
          
      288. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    288. 
            

            

            
          
      289. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    289. 
            

            

                  # Synonym mapping (reuse from InventoryCreationAnalyzer)
          
      290. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    290. 
            

            

                  synonym_map = {
          
      291. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    291. 
            
              22
            

            

                    "satchel" => "bags",
          
      292. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    292. 
            

            

                    "handbag" => "handbags",
          
      293. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    293. 
            

            

                    "backpack" => "backpacks",
          
      294. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    294. 
            

            

                    "tote" => "totes",
          
      295. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    295. 
            

            

                    "clutch" => "clutches",
          
      296. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    296. 
            

            

                    "purse" => "handbags",
          
      297. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    297. 
            

            

                    "messenger" => "bags",
          
      298. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    298. 
            

            

                    "boot" => "boots",

              def self.calculate_style_similarity(outfit_items, candidate_item)
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

                return 0.0 unless candidate_item.embedding_vector.present?
          
      203.

      205.

      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206.

      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

            
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

                # Simple average of vectors (for style matching)
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209.
